app.name: Wii Mobiclip Player
app.long_description:
A Wii homebrew app that plays Wii Mobiclip files directly on hardware. No transcoding is used, every video is decoded on the Wii. It supports ADPCM, FastAudio, PCM, and Vorbis audio.
Controls:
Browser: - **+Control Pad Up/Down** — move selection - **A** — open folder / play file - **B** — parent folder - **HOME** — exit
During playback: - **A** / **+** — pause / resume - **B** / **HOME** — stop, back to browser
